name: armory
summary: Weapons and armor stored for rapid issue — wall-hugging racks, a central clear floor, a quartermaster's station.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: roughly rectangular, slight elongation along rack walls

primary_palette.note: small hidden cache — a single rack and locked chests
ceremonial armory — ranked suits like silent soldiers
working armory — maintenance station doubles as quartermaster

story_prompts: a well-maintained company armory with every weapon accounted for by tag
looted armory after a coup — empty pegs, one broken sword on the floor
ceremonial armory of a defunct order, suits of armor covered in dust
improvised armory in a captured room — mismatched weapons leaning on walls
cultist armory with consecrated blades and black-iron helms
anti_patterns: don't place racks in the center — weapons hug walls so the floor stays clear for mustering
don't light with a single weak torch in a big armory — the quartermaster needs to see inventory
avoid heavy carpets; this is a working room, not a parlor
